## Meeting Purpose

[Daniel pitched a new generalist engineering role to Leonardo.](https://fathom.video/share/g6aJ5D_6BukL9HHpuji-aJvnozcSnWP6?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**The Role:** A generalist engineer to act as Daniel's "extension," handling QA, project polish, and team enablement (e.g., AI-native onboarding) to free up Daniel's time for strategy and recruiting.](https://fathom.video/share/g6aJ5D_6BukL9HHpuji-aJvnozcSnWP6?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [**The Fit:** Leonardo's background—a "generalizing specialist" with a strong QA foundation from ThoughtWorks and a pragmatic, "get things done" mindset—is a direct match for the role's needs.](https://fathom.video/share/g6aJ5D_6BukL9HHpuji-aJvnozcSnWP6?tab=summary&timestamp=3298.0)
  - [**The Company:** GrowthX is an AI-native marketing agency building its own SaaS products (ContentOS, CheckDat, AI Framework) to scale content creation and LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/g6aJ5D_6BukL9HHpuji-aJvnozcSnWP6?tab=summary&timestamp=2070.0)
  - [**Next Steps:** Leonardo will interview with Bridget (VP of Ops) and Jean-Pierre (Design Engineer) to continue the process.](https://fathom.video/share/g6aJ5D_6BukL9HHpuji-aJvnozcSnWP6?tab=summary&timestamp=5103.0)

## Topics

### The Need: A CTO's "Extension"

  - [Daniel requires an "extension" to increase his bandwidth for strategy, product deep dives, and recruiting.](https://fathom.video/share/g6aJ5D_6BukL9HHpuji-aJvnozcSnWP6?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [**Primary Gaps:**](https://fathom.video/share/g6aJ5D_6BukL9HHpuji-aJvnozcSnWP6?tab=summary&timestamp=4393.0)
      - [**QA & Project Polish:** Daniel currently handles all final QA and bug fixing (the "last mile"), which delays launches.](https://fathom.video/share/g6aJ5D_6BukL9HHpuji-aJvnozcSnWP6?tab=summary&timestamp=4393.0)
      - [**Team Enablement:** A formal AI-native onboarding program is needed to train senior engineers on tools like Cloud Code.](https://fathom.video/share/g6aJ5D_6BukL9HHpuji-aJvnozcSnWP6?tab=summary&timestamp=2672.0)
      - [**Recruiting:** Daniel lacks time to define take-home assignments and technical evaluations for new hires.](https://fathom.video/share/g6aJ5D_6BukL9HHpuji-aJvnozcSnWP6?tab=summary&timestamp=4684.0)
      - [**Internal Tooling:** Many internal automation projects are on hold.](https://fathom.video/share/g6aJ5D_6BukL9HHpuji-aJvnozcSnWP6?tab=summary&timestamp=4701.0)

### The Solution: Leonardo's Profile

  - [Daniel created the role specifically for Leonardo, whose background is a direct fit.](https://fathom.video/share/g6aJ5D_6BukL9HHpuji-aJvnozcSnWP6?tab=summary&timestamp=3466.0)
  - [**Background:**](https://fathom.video/share/g6aJ5D_6BukL9HHpuji-aJvnozcSnWP6?tab=summary&timestamp=2829.0)
      - [**ThoughtWorks (2010–2016):** Started in QA, transitioned to full-stack engineering, and led quality culture initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/g6aJ5D_6BukL9HHpuji-aJvnozcSnWP6?tab=summary&timestamp=2937.0)
      - [**GasLogix (6 years):** A "generalizing specialist" who solved problems across the stack (.NET, Python, React).](https://fathom.video/share/g6aJ5D_6BukL9HHpuji-aJvnozcSnWP6?tab=summary&timestamp=3173.0)
      - [**Current Role (Ryan):** Full-stack engineer focused on backend, backlog organization, and process improvement.](https://fathom.video/share/g6aJ5D_6BukL9HHpuji-aJvnozcSnWP6?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [**Mindset:**](https://fathom.video/share/g6aJ5D_6BukL9HHpuji-aJvnozcSnWP6?tab=summary&timestamp=3507.0)
      - [**Pragmatic:** "Fazer o que tem que ser feito" (do what needs to be done).](https://fathom.video/share/g6aJ5D_6BukL9HHpuji-aJvnozcSnWP6?tab=summary&timestamp=3590.0)
      - [**AI-Native:** Actively studied AI tools (Cursor, Cloud Code) after a previous GrowthX interview and embraces them as a productivity multiplier.](https://fathom.video/share/g6aJ5D_6BukL9HHpuji-aJvnozcSnWP6?tab=summary&timestamp=3635.0)

### GrowthX: An AI-Native Marketing Engine

  - [**Origin:** Founded by Marcel Leveson (ex-CMO, HashiCorp, Scale AI) to scale content marketing.](https://fathom.video/share/g6aJ5D_6BukL9HHpuji-aJvnozcSnWP6?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)
  - [**Core Strategy:** Build internal SaaS tools first, then offer them to clients.](https://fathom.video/share/g6aJ5D_6BukL9HHpuji-aJvnozcSnWP6?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
  - [**The Four Products:**](https://fathom.video/share/g6aJ5D_6BukL9HHpuji-aJvnozcSnWP6?tab=summary&timestamp=2070.0)
    1.  **ContentOS:** Internal platform for managing client content operations.
          - [**Features:** Unified analytics (GA, Fathom, GSC), client context (writing guidelines, personas), and site inventory monitoring.](https://fathom.video/share/g6aJ5D_6BukL9HHpuji-aJvnozcSnWP6?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)
          - [**Team:** 6 people (including Daniel).](https://fathom.video/share/g6aJ5D_6BukL9HHpuji-aJvnozcSnWP6?tab=summary&timestamp=2551.0)
    2.  **AI Framework:** A code-first framework (TypeScript) for building AI workflows.
          - [**Rationale:** Replaces fragile drag-and-drop tools like AirOps with scalable, version-controlled code.](https://fathom.video/share/g6aJ5D_6BukL9HHpuji-aJvnozcSnWP6?tab=summary&timestamp=1250.0)
          - [**Future:** Open-source the framework and launch a cloud registry for workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/g6aJ5D_6BukL9HHpuji-aJvnozcSnWP6?tab=summary&timestamp=2126.0)
          - [**Team:** 3 people.](https://fathom.video/share/g6aJ5D_6BukL9HHpuji-aJvnozcSnWP6?tab=summary&timestamp=2432.0)
    3.  **CheckDat:** A freemium product for monitoring company visibility in LLM search results.
          - [**Status:** Launching this month.](https://fathom.video/share/g6aJ5D_6BukL9HHpuji-aJvnozcSnWP6?tab=summary&timestamp=2064.0)
          - [**Team:** 2-3 people.](https://fathom.video/share/g6aJ5D_6BukL9HHpuji-aJvnozcSnWP6?tab=summary&timestamp=2521.0)
    4.  **Client Ops:** A team of "deploy engineers" who build and manage client workflows.
          - [**Team:** 4 people.](https://fathom.video/share/g6aJ5D_6BukL9HHpuji-aJvnozcSnWP6?tab=summary&timestamp=2590.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Daniel:**](https://fathom.video/share/g6aJ5D_6BukL9HHpuji-aJvnozcSnWP6?tab=summary&timestamp=5103.0)
      - [Ask Tucker to schedule interviews for Leonardo with Bridget (VP of Ops) and Jean-Pierre (Design Engineer).](https://fathom.video/share/g6aJ5D_6BukL9HHpuji-aJvnozcSnWP6?tab=summary&timestamp=5103.0)
  - [**Leonardo:**](https://fathom.video/share/g6aJ5D_6BukL9HHpuji-aJvnozcSnWP6?tab=summary&timestamp=5103.0)
      - [Interview with Bridget and Jean-Pierre.](https://fathom.video/share/g6aJ5D_6BukL9HHpuji-aJvnozcSnWP6?tab=summary&timestamp=5103.0)
